summary: Completed comprehensive testing of International News Source Expansion feature. All 40 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend authentication and country selector working correctly. All key features verified: 20 countries with 10 sources each, country filtering, new article schema fields.
passed_tests: Backend: All countries have flag_emoji, country_code, country_name, primary_language, city_tier_1 (5), city_tier_2 (5)
Backend: GET /api/countries/IN/sources returns India with 10 sources, 5 tier 1 cities, 5 tier 2 cities
Backend: GET /api/countries/PK/sources returns Pakistan with primary_language Urdu
Backend: GET /api/countries/BD/sources returns Bangladesh with primary_language Bangla
Backend: POST /api/crawl/US returns success message (background crawl)
Backend: All 20 countries (US, GB, IN, CA, AU, PK, BD, NG, ZA, DE, FR, JP, BR, MX, KE, EG, AE, ID, PH, KR) have 10 sources each
Backend: GET /api/articles returns articles with source_country, source_language, low_confidence_flag fields
Backend: GET /api/articles/{id} returns article with source_country, source_language, low_confidence_flag, rewrite_status, safety_status
Backend: PUT /api/auth/me with country update works correctly
Backend: Articles filtered by user's country when authenticated (US user sees US articles)
Frontend: Login flow works correctly with data-testid selectors
Frontend: Profile page loads with country selector showing flag emojis
Frontend: Country selector dropdown shows all 20 countries with flags and languages
Frontend: Changing country updates user profile and filters feed
Frontend: Feed page shows user's country with flag in header (🇺🇸 New York, United States)
Frontend: Feed shows India articles with 🇮🇳 flag after country change
Frontend: NewsCard source language badge ready (no non-English articles to display currently)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test@test.com user, reverted country back to United States after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 40 backend tests for country expansion passed. Frontend authentication working correctly with data-testid selectors. Country selector on Profile page shows all 20 countries with flag emojis and languages. Feed page filters articles by user's selected country. User test@test.com has country set to United States. GPT-4o rewrites running in background - some articles have rewrite_status=pending.

features_verified.20_countries_database: ✅ All 20 countries with 200 total sources seeded
features_verified.profile_country_selector: ✅ Dropdown with flag emojis and primary languages
